scripts.build: mkdir -p build-pack && cp -r main.js renderer.js login.js preload.js index.html login.html styles.css package.json node_modules build/icon.png build-pack/ && javascript-obfuscator build-pack/main.js build-pack/renderer.js build-pack/login.js build-pack/preload.js --output build-pack --rename-globals true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 1 && electron-builder build --project build-pack --publish never
scripts.release: mkdir -p build-pack && cp -r main.js renderer.js login.js preload.js index.html login.html styles.css package.json node_modules build/icon.png build-pack/ && javascript-obfuscator build-pack/main.js build-pack/renderer.js build-pack/login.js build-pack/preload.js --output build-pack --rename-globals true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 1 && electron-builder build --project build-pack --publish always
